title: SolarEdge Technologies (SEDG) Q4 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: SolarEdge Q4 2023 Financial Results. Full Year 2023 Results: SolarEdge concluded 2023 with 3.0 billion in revenue, just below 2022 levels. Q4 2023 Performance: Reported EPS was -0.92, which exceeded expectations of -1.47. GAAP gross margin was 23.6% compared to 27.2% in the prior year, while non-GAAP gross margin was 26.7%, compared to 28.2% in the prior year. Market Context: The first half of 2023 included record installations and expectations for continued growth, with a shift in the second half of the year to a weaker market due to higher interest rates and lower power prices, which resulted in an inventory buildup that slowed shipments. The earnings were announced on February 20, 2024, and the company noted challenges in the second half of 2023 but expressed confidence in their positioning for future growth.
